economic_notes: Nation owns multiple GBEs including seafood operations (TFN Seafoods), resort (Tin Wis Resort/Tsawaak RV Resort), and three micro-hydro power projects (Haa-ak-suuk Creek, Winchie Creek, Canoe Creek). GBEs reported a combined loss of $1,080,587 in 2021. Nation has guaranteed two loans for TWR Resort Limited Partnership with Bank of Montreal at 3.75%. COVID-19 noted as significant event with uncertain impact.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (ended March 31, 2021), not 2024. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method include Tla-o-qui-aht First Nation Economic Development Corporation, TFN Master Limited Partnership, Tsiix-Waa-Cahs Holdings Ltd, and Tsawaak RV Resort LLP. GBE investees have December 31 year-end. Tangible capital asset net book value not fully extractable from partial schedule (schedule cut off). ISC funding flows through Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council per Note 13. Total government transfers estimated as NTC + DFO + BC + FNHA + BC Gaming + CMHC. Prior year accumulated surplus includes treaty loan forgiveness of $5,614,886 as one-time item. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Net financial assets shown as net debt of $(10,180,225).
